description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a predominantly white and black exterior. The front facade includes a large driveway bordered by low stone walls and a decorative gate, leading up to a garage and main entrance. The structure is surrounded by evenly spaced, rounded green trees, providing a sense of privacy and greenery. Large windows are visible on the front and side, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The rear and side views show a more minimalistic design, with fewer windows and a continuous line of trees encircling the property. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a strong geometric presence.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a white and black exterior, large windows, and a stone-bordered driveway, surrounded by rounded green trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, decorative gate, garage, main entrance, and large windows, with trees flanking both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended driveway, minimal windows, and a dense row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous line of trees, a flat roof, and a mostly windowless back wall.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view emphasizing the flat roof, geometric layout, and the arrangement of trees around the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
